ModDescription: It's rakor's VT checker script but for MCM yippee

Tabs.TabName: Pls to make my blorbo's body not a void anymore uwu

Sections.SectionDescription:
Get a list of VT mods in your load order without using the console. The list can be exported as a text file for you to access without needing the game to run.

The script will not run until a save has been fully loaded. The Run Script and Export List buttons stay disabled until then.

Settings.Name: Run Script
Settings.Tooltip: Displays the current list of VT mods below.

Settings.Name: Output
Settings.Tooltip: You can copypaste this or export the output to a text file below.

Settings.Name: Export List
Settings.Tooltip: Export the list of VT mods to your ScriptExtender folder.
